Footer.mission: We put quality back at the center of the news: visible sources, declared context, respect for your time and your intelligence.

Takedown.title: Takedown request
Takedown.subtitle: Report content under the DSA (art. 16). Your notice is logged and reviewed by our team.
Takedown.targetHint: The article ID is the trailing number in the article page URL. For a source, give the source ID.
Takedown.reasonPlaceholder: Describe why the content should be removed (min. 10 characters).
Takedown.reasonHint: Be specific: legal basis, rights infringed, references.
Takedown.sentWithId: We received your request (ref. #{id}). We'll review it as soon as possible.
Takedown.sentDescription: We received your request. We'll review it as soon as possible.

errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.targetNotFound: Content not found. Check the ID and try again.
errors.submitFailed: Submission failed. Check the details and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

takedown.title: Takedown requests
takedown.subtitle: Handle DSA (art. 16/17) notices: review and resolve removal requests.
takedown.emptyDescription: There are no takedown requests for this filter.
takedown.removedWarning: "Removed" takes the article out of the feed (status: takedown_done). Applied immediately.

ReadingLists.subtitle: Organize the articles you save.

Stats.title: Reading stats
Stats.subtitle: Variety indices for your reading: how much you diversify sources and topics.
Stats.distinctSourcesHint: Share of distinct sources across your interactions: the higher it is, the more varied the publishers you read.
Stats.topTopicShareHint: How much your most frequent topic weighs: lower values mean more varied reading.
Stats.totalInteractionsHint: Actions recorded in the selected window.
Stats.emptyDescription: Read and interact with a few articles — your reading variety will show up here.

Search.title: Search
Search.subtitle: Search articles by keyword or browse by topic. Results link out to the publisher.

Search.emptyDescription: No articles for "{term}". Try other words or a topic.
Search.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no results} one {# result} other {# results}}

Feed.heading: Your feed
Feed.subheading: An ordered selection of what matters, with the source always visible. Tap a headline to read on the publisher.
Feed.modeAnonNote: Modes personalize the feed once you sign in. While signed out you see a neutral cold-start selection.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.help: A calibrated mix of recency, relevance and variety.

more_pluralism.label: More pluralism
more_pluralism.help: Broadens the range of sources and viewpoints.

most_personalized.label: Most personalized
most_personalized.help: Leans more on your interests and actions.

less_personalized.label: Less personalized
less_personalized.help: Reduces the weight of your profile for a wider view.

chronological.label: Chronological
chronological.help: In time order, with no algorithmic re-ranking.

why.intro: This item is ranked using several signals. Here's how much each one weighs.

topicMatch.label: Topic match
topicMatch.help: How well the topic fits your interests.

sourceDiversity.label: Source diversity
sourceDiversity.help: Favors a range of sources, avoiding concentration.

topicVariety.label: Topic variety
topicVariety.help: Keeps the feed varied, not a single subject.

clusterProminence.label: Story prominence
clusterProminence.help: How much the story stands out across sources.

list.errorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.
list.emptyDescription: There's nothing to show right now. Check back later.
list.caughtUpDescription: You've seen everything we've selected for now. Check back later for more.

Article.linkFirstNote: Ager always links to the original source. We don't host the article text.

Sources.heading: Sources
Sources.subheading: The publishers and outlets Ager gathers news from, with type and publisher group.
Sources.emptyDescription: There are no sources to show right now. Check back later.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The content you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again shortly.

Styleguide.title: Ager design system
Styleguide.intro: Ager's visual identity applied to the interface components. A coherent, sober, editorial baseline to review before wiring real data.

palette.note: Official brand colors. No high saturation, no colored shadows. Recommended distribution: ~60% neutrals, ~25% blue, ≤10% green, ~5% functional.
palette.agerBlue: Header, headings, primary CTAs. Never long body text.

type.note: Merriweather for headings and the wordmark, Inter for UI and body. Layered hierarchy: synthesis → context → depth.
type.sampleBody: Body copy uses Inter at 16px with generous line height, built for short but dense explanations. Simplification serves understanding, not dumbing-down: we define key terms and separate facts from interpretation.
type.caption: Caption

logo.note: Clear space equal to 14% of the symbol. Minimum digital sizes: full logo 120px, icon 32px.
logo.forbidden: Forbidden: shadows or effects, colors outside the palette, rotation, deformation, a wordmark in any font other than Merriweather.

buttons.note: Primary in blue, secondary in ethical green. Secondary CTAs remain an accent.

badges.note: Low-saturation labels. Green signals trust and context, orange evolution, red error.

surfaces.note: Cards, loading skeletons, and empty or error states, in a measured tone.
surfaces.cardDescription: A short supporting description in muted gray.
surfaces.emptyDescription: There's nothing to show here yet. Check back later.
surfaces.errorDescription: We couldn't load the content. Please try again shortly.

feed.note: The reusable feed component: only title, excerpt, source, image and topics. Link-first — no article body. The third card shows the image placeholder. Sample data.

Explore.title: Explore by topic
Explore.subtitle: Pick a theme and browse the most relevant articles, with sources always in plain sight.
Explore.pickDescription: Tap a tag above to see related articles.
Explore.emptyDescription: There are no articles for “{tag}” yet.
Explore.resultsFor: {count, plural, =0 {No articles} one {# article} other {# articles}} for “{tag}”

PublicList.metaDescription: A collection of articles shared on Ager.
PublicList.notFoundDescription: This list doesn't exist or is no longer public.
PublicList.emptyDescription: This list has no articles yet.

About.title: About us
About.intro: Ager puts quality back at the heart of the news: visible sources, declared context, respect for your time and your intelligence.
About.missionBody: We want to cut the noise and raise understanding. We curate and organise the news to give you the picture, not just the headline: every article comes with its source in plain sight and the context you need to judge it.
About.visionBody: We imagine news where trust isn't assumed but earned. No tricks to keep you scrolling, no notifications engineered for addiction: just tools that help you understand the world and then get back to your life.
About.methodBody: We aggregate verified sources, declare their licences and provenance, and always show the path back to the original publisher. The relevance score is transparent and topics are browsable: you decide what to dig into.
About.closing: Ager is an independent editorial project. If you'd like to suggest a source or report an issue, get in touch.
